channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.description: A former Republican operative claims that one of the women accusing Democratic Senate candidate Graham Platner has connections to conservative political efforts that played a role during Supreme Court...

item.title: Conservative Pastor Criticizes Obama Presidential Center Ahead of Chicago Opening
item.description: A controversy emerged ahead of the public opening of the Obama Presidential Center in Chicago when conservative radio host and pastor Todd Friel publicly criticized the project. According to reports h...

item.title: Suspect in Minnesota Lawmaker Assassination Reaches Plea Agreement as Prosecutors Decline Death Penalty

item.title: Legal commentators question U.S. Attorney Jay Clayton's frequent television appearances and political remarks

item.description: Researchers at the University of California San Diego, working with BAE Systems Space & Mission Systems, have developed a space-qualified optical metasurface measuring only six millimeters in diameter...

item.title: Trump Faces Criticism After Saying 'I Love the Inflation' During White House Event
item.description: President Donald Trump sparked controversy during a White House event on June 10, 2026, when he stated, 'I love the inflation' while signing the Secure America Act. The remark quickly attracted attent...

item.title: Researchers Identify a 1,200-Kilometer Deep-Sea Whale Necropolis in the Indian Ocean
item.description: Scientists have identified what may be the largest known accumulation of whale remains ever found on the seafloor. The site, named the Diamantina Zone necropolis, stretches for more than 1,200 kilomet...
